prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2072aba6`.
codex_response:
Implemented `2072aba6` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2072aba6/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2072aba6/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2072aba6/generator.py#L1). The rule is: `2x` upscale the input, keep `0` as `0`, and turn each `5` block into a fixed `2x2` checkerboard with `1` on even-parity cells and `2` on odd-parity cells. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples exactly, and I did not add any new shared primitive.

The generator stays in-family by creating black square inputs with one connected gray motif, then deriving the output with the same local checkerboard substitution. I widened the input size range in the generator so the build could produce 1000 unique examples; the visual sanity check on [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2072aba6/previews/preview_01.png) looked consistent with the official task, alongside [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2072aba6/previews/originals.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2072aba6/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2072aba6/previews/preview_03.png). Generated data is at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2072aba6/task.json).

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 2072aba6` -> `4/4` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 2072aba6 --n-examples 1000` -> artifacts built
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 2072aba6` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed
